commands.review_summary:
The PR adds global `session.groupScope` and per-binding `bindings[].session.groupScope` so group/channel peers can optionally use the agent main session, with routing tests and docs updates.

PR surface: Source +25, Tests +189, Docs +27, Generated 0. Total +241 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the patch defects: source inspection shows `groupScope` changes session-key output but is absent from the resolved-route cache key, and the new schema keys lack matching help/label metadata. No runtime test was run because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer product/security review for a new session-sharing config surface; automation cannot supply that proof or decide the privacy posture.
